history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A low-angle, slightly grainy, vintage-style mirror selfie taken in a dimly lit room. Two young people, a girl and a boy, are reflected in the mirror. The girl on the left has long, dark hair and is wearing a pink sweatshirt with a white collar peeking out. She has on oversized, heart-shaped red sunglasses. The boy on the right has dark, messy hair and is wearing pink-rimmed sunglasses. He's wearing a black jacket over a white and black striped shirt. He's holding a smartphone in his right hand, taking the picture, and pointing his left index finger towards his ear. The background is dark and blurry, with some subtle lighting creating a halo effect around their heads. The overall mood is playful and casual, with a hint of an edgy, retro aesthetic due to the lighting and grainy texture.
